name: Improper Output Neutralization for Logs
description: The product writes user-controlled data to log files without neutralizing special elements (newlines, control characters, log format delimiters), allowing attackers to forge log entries, inject false audit trails, or exploit log analysis tools.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that flows to STORAGE[log_file] or EGRESS[log_output] without a TRANSFORM[log_encoding] node that strips or encodes newlines, control characters, and log-format-significant delimiters before writing
